commands.review_summary:
The PR guards model provider alias collection in `src/commands/models/provider-aliases.ts` and adds a Vitest regression for unreadable manifest alias metadata.

PR surface: Source +77, Tests +69. Total +146 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main performs unguarded `plugin.modelCatalog` and alias enumeration reads, and the PR body records a red focused repro using a throwing metadata getter. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this maintainer draft PR needs ordinary scope and landing review rather than a code fix.

target.title: fix(commands): guard model provider aliases
target.body:
## Summary

- Guard model provider alias collection against unreadable manifest model-catalog metadata.
- Skip poisoned alias maps and alias target rows while preserving later healthy aliases.
- Keep bundled source-peer fallback behind safe manifest `id` / `origin` / `rootDir` reads.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/provider-aliases.test.ts -t "skips unreadable manifest alias metadata" --reporter=verbose` failed pre-fix with `model alias metadata exploded`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/provider-aliases.test.ts -t "skips unreadable manifest alias metadata" --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/provider-aliases.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/models/provider-aliases.ts src/commands/models/provider-aliases.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/commands/models/provider-aliases.ts src/commands/models/provider-aliases.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a malformed plugin manifest with unreadable model-catalog alias metadata no longer crashes model-list provider alias canonicalization before later healthy aliases can be used.

Real environment tested: local linked `gwt` worktree on the branch, using the repo Vitest wrapper for the narrow touched command/model test.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: red focused repro, focused regression test, full touched test file, oxfmt, oxlint, diff whitespace check, and local plus branch autoreview.

Evidence after fix: the focused regression test passes, and the full touched test file passes with 1 test.

Observed result after fix: poisoned manifest `modelCatalog`, alias-map enumeration, and alias target provider reads are skipped while the healthy `kimi -> moonshot` alias still canonicalizes.

What was not tested: remote `pnpm check:changed`; Crabbox AWS setup failed before lease creation with coordinator HTTP 401 on `/v1/runs` and `/v1/leases`.
target.author: vincentkoc
